field:Server.Dir.note: Rust configures the identity/state directory through the builder

field:Server.Logf.note: Rust uses one typed builder callback for server logging

field:Server.UserLogf.note: Rust routes user-facing and server log text through the builder logger

field:ServiceListener.FQDN.note: Rust exposes the service FQDN through an accessor

field:ServiceModeHTTP.HTTPS.note: Rust represents HTTPS as a ServiceMode constructor

field:ServiceModeHTTP.PROXYProtocol.note: Rust enables the supported PROXY protocol through a mode builder

field:ServiceModeHTTP.Port.note: Rust exposes a common service-mode port accessor

field:ServiceModeTCP.PROXYProtocolVersio.note: Rust supports the implemented PROXY protocol through a boolean mode builder

field:ServiceModeTCP.Port.note: Rust exposes a common service-mode port accessor

field:ServiceModeTCP.TerminateTLS.note: Rust represents TLS termination as HTTPS service mode

method:Server.Start.note: ensure_up is the idempotent async start operation

method:Server.Sys.note: Rust spells the typed dependency container accessor system

method:Server.TailscaleIPs.note: Rust returns assigned addresses in the ServerStatus snapshot

type:ServiceModeHTTP.note: Rust uses one enum for TCP, HTTP, and HTTPS service modes

type:ServiceModeTCP.note: Rust uses one enum for TCP, HTTP, and HTTPS service modes
